name: ololand-dd
description: Institutional due diligence for Claude — deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / Real Options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy with SaaS / healthcare / real-estate / industrial overlays, forensic QoE primitives, cross-document reconciliation (CPA > tax > management > AI), MaskablePPO war-game simulation, assumption controls that gate IC approval, analytical workbench tools for QoE/compliance/scenarios/earnings, value-impact ledger reads, deal-health actions, workbooks, company discovery, watchlists, IC-package lifecycle dispatch, advisory requests, verified forensic screen marketplace support, and a regulator-grade audit trail with replay and compliance-framework exports. Three sub-agents (dd-analyst, forensic-screener, war-game-strategist) plus a flywheel that retrains from analyst corrections. Counter-positions Anthropic's native private-equity plugin.
